# PDF Test Fixtures

Place text-based PDF files containing tables here for regression testing.

## Recommended test PDFs

- A simple PDF with one bordered table (lattice strategy)
- A PDF with multiple tables on different pages
- Edge case: PDF with no tables (should error gracefully)

## Creating a test PDF

On macOS, you can print a Numbers/Excel spreadsheet to PDF via File → Print → Save as PDF.

## Current fixtures

- `simple.pdf` — basic bordered table with headers + data rows (to be added)
